message:
fix: Return errors instead of emitting placeholder code

- expressions.zig: Return error.UnsupportedSyntax for statement nodes
  passed to expression dispatcher (was emitting null placeholder)
- collections.zig: Return error.UnsupportedSyntax for iter()/next()
  with no arguments (Python TypeError case)
- generator.zig: Emit null for yield without value (yields None in
  Python, not undefined)
